args.subject: Fernwood Ltd: data export manifest prepared
args.body: The data export manifest for Fernwood Ltd (TCK-8850) has been prepared and includes: crm_contacts (primary-db), invoices (primary-db), usage_events (event-lake), support_threads (helpdesk). Legal hold checked: none active.

args.subject: Your Halcyon access has now ended
args.body: This confirms that Fernwood Ltd's access to Halcyon has now been revoked, following the end of your contract.

args.subject: Your pro-rata Halcyon refund
args.body: A pro-rata refund of 240.00 has been issued to order ORD-3320 following the end of your Halcyon contract.

args.text: Refund of 240.00 issued against ORD-3320 and accounts@fernwood.example notified.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd: deletion schedule confirmed
args.body: Deletion schedule for Fernwood Ltd exported data is confirmed: all exported datasets (crm_contacts, invoices, usage_events, support_threads) will be deleted on 2026-08-16, per the 30-day retention rule.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd offboarding complete
args.body: Fernwood Ltd's offboarding (TCK-8850) is complete: data exported, access revoked, pro-rata refund issued, and deletion scheduled for 2026-08-16.
